title: Acl
description: An ACL container that holds a list of IP address and CIDR range entries used for access control at the edge.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL.

service_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the service.

version.description: The version number the ACL is associated with.

created_at.description: The date and time the ACL was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the ACL was last updated.

deleted_at.description: The date and time the ACL was deleted.
